billing.title: Billing & Subscriptions

faq.q1: How long does the free plan last?
faq.a1: The free plan has no time limit. You can use it as long as you want.
faq.q2: Can I switch to a paid plan?
faq.a2: Yes, at any time. Your data is preserved.
faq.a3: The free plan may show informational banners.

faq.a1: Yes — you can cancel payment at any time.
faq.a2: Yes, we issue a VAT invoice for every purchase.
faq.a3: You keep access until the end of the paid period.

faq.a1: Up to 10 team members on the Business plan.
faq.a2: Yes — AI assistant and photo estimation are included.
faq.a3: The Team module is in preparation and will be available in the next update.

faq.a1: Yes — an SLA agreement is available for Enterprise plans.
faq.a2: Yes — for larger teams, please contact us.
faq.a3: After purchase, API keys are available in Settings → API.

renovationFinishing.name: Renovation / Finishing

plumbing.name: Plumbing
plumbing.content:
Dear {client_name},

We are sending you an offer for plumbing installation: {project_name}.

Plumbing work value: {total_price}
Completion time: {deadline}

The offer includes:
• Installation design
• Delivery of materials and fittings
• Installation works
• Leak tests and installation acceptance

We only use proven materials from renowned manufacturers. We provide a warranty for the work performed.

You will find a detailed cost estimate in the attached document.

Please contact us to arrange details.

Best regards,
{company_name}
Phone: {company_phone}

electrical.name: Electrical
electrical.content:
Dear {client_name},

We present an offer for electrical installation: {project_name}.

Electrical work value: {total_price}
Planned implementation time: {deadline}

Scope of work includes:
• Electrical system design
• Installation according to standards
• Connection of devices and equipment
• Measurements and acceptance protocols

All work is performed by qualified personnel using certified materials. We guarantee compliance with safety regulations.

Technical details and cost estimate in the attached PDF.

We are at your disposal.

Best regards,
{company_name}
Phone: {company_phone}

testimonials.t1Text: I can finally send professional PDFs in minutes instead of hours.
testimonials.t2Text: Customer database and calendar on my phone — everything at hand on site.
testimonials.t3Text: Three languages is a perfect match. I employ Ukrainians and everyone works in their own.

results.sectionSubtitle: A platform designed to help — not to promise miracles. Here are the real benefits of daily use.

time.title: Faster quotes
time.desc: Instead of manually creating spreadsheets — fill in items, choose a template, and generate a PDF. Ready to send.

quality.title: Professional-looking offers
quality.desc: Your offers look like they come from a large company — with logo, itemised table, and professional formatting. The client sees quality.

control.title: Order in projects
control.desc: Clients, projects, quotes, and finances — all in one system instead of scattered files and notes.

principles.youDecide: You decide — AI helps, doesn't replace

cta.desc2: Join contractors who manage their business digitally.

footer.desc: Professional quotes and project management for tradespeople. Fast, easy, secure.
footer.brand_desc: Platform for craftspeople and contractors in Poland.

how.sectionSubtitle: Three steps and you're ready to work.
how.step1_desc: Registration takes a moment. Free plan available right away — no credit card required.
how.step2_desc: Create a project, assign a client, add tasks and materials.
how.step3_desc: Generate a professional PDF and send it to the client in a few clicks.

pricing.sectionSubtitle: Free plan to start — no credit card. Upgrade when you need it.
pricing.vatNote: Net prices · 23% VAT added to every purchase
pricing.cancelNote: Cancel any time · VAT invoices provided
pricing.enterpriseContact: Contact us — Enterprise plan coming soon.

faq.sectionSubtitle: Can't find an answer? Write to kontakt@majster.ai
faq.q1: Do I need to sign a contract?
faq.a1: Yes! You can start with the free plan — no credit card, no commitment. Upgrade to Pro or Business whenever you're ready.
faq.a2: Data is protected and access is controlled. You can manage permissions and know who has access to what information.
faq.q3: Does the app work on mobile?
faq.a3: Yes, the app is fully optimized for mobile devices. You can use it on any smartphone with a web browser.
faq.q4: How long is the free access?
faq.a4: The free plan is free for 30 days. After that you can choose a paid plan suited to your needs.
faq.q5: What languages does the app support?
faq.a5: The app supports three languages: Polish, English and Ukrainian. You can change the language in settings at any time.

addons.title: Purchase more resources
addons.subtitle: Your plan limit has been reached. Choose an add-on to extend it.
addons.vatNote: Net price + 23% VAT. Payment via Stripe.
addons.comingSoon: Purchasing individual add-ons via Stripe will be available soon. To increase limits now, upgrade to a higher plan.

terms.subtitle: Majster.AI — platform terms of use
terms.agreement: By using Majster.AI you confirm that you have read and accept these Terms of Service.
terms.metaDesc: Majster.AI Terms of Service — rules, rights and user obligations.
terms.s1content:
1.1. These Terms of Service govern the use of the Majster.AI platform.

1.2. Majster.AI is a SaaS platform for creating quotes, estimates and invoices for construction and renovation professionals.

1.3. By using the platform, you accept these Terms and the Privacy Policy.

1.4. Definitions:
• Service — the Majster.AI application
• User — any person using the Service
• Account — individual User account
• Subscription — paid access plan
terms.s2content:
2.1. Majster.AI offers:
• Client and project management
• Quote and estimate creation
• Professional PDF generation
• Offer delivery by email
• AI assistant (paid plans)
• Calendar and scheduling
• Analytics and reports

2.2. Access to features depends on subscription plan.

2.3. We reserve the right to modify services with 30 days notice.
terms.s3content:
3.1. Available plans: FREE, STARTER, BUSINESS, ENTERPRISE.

3.2. Payments are due upfront for each billing period.

3.3. Prices are in PLN and include 23% VAT.

3.4. Refunds available within 14 days of purchase.

3.5. Non-payment results in downgrade to FREE plan.
terms.s4content:
4.1. Prohibited:
• Unlawful use of the Service
• Bypassing security or limits
• Sharing accounts with third parties
• Automated data scraping
• Sending spam or unsolicited messages
• Publishing offensive or illegal content

4.2. Violations may result in warning, suspension, or permanent account removal.
terms.s5content:
5.1. Majster.AI is not liable for:
• User-submitted content
• Outages caused by force majeure
• Losses from errors in estimates
• Technical issues on the User's side

5.2. Total liability is limited to subscription fees paid in the past 12 months.

5.3. Users are responsible for data accuracy, password security, and tax compliance.
terms.s6content:
6.1. Governing law: Polish law.

6.2. Disputes shall be resolved by the court having jurisdiction over Majster.AI's registered office.

6.3. These Terms may be amended with 30 days notice.

6.4. Contact: kontakt.majsterai@gmail.com

6.5. These Terms are effective from the date of publication.

page.heading: Terms of Service
page.section1Text1: These terms define the rules for using the Majster.AI application — a tool for managing construction projects and creating estimates.
page.section1Text2: By using the application, you accept the provisions of these terms.
page.planFree: free for the first 30 days, then with limited features
page.section3Text: Payments are processed through the secure Stripe system. You can cancel your subscription at any time.
page.prohibition1: Sharing your account with third parties
page.prohibition3: Using the application for unlawful purposes
page.section5Intro: Majster.AI makes every effort to ensure the service operates correctly. We are not liable for:
page.liability2: Errors in estimates resulting from incorrect data
page.liability3: Damages resulting from improper use of the application
page.liability4: Data loss due to causes beyond our control
page.section6Text1: We reserve the right to change the terms. Users will be notified of significant changes by email with 14 days notice.
page.section6Text2: Matters not covered by these terms are governed by Polish law.

privacy.subtitle: Majster.AI — protection of your personal data
privacy.metaDesc: Majster.AI Privacy Policy — how we protect your personal data in compliance with GDPR.
privacy.footer: This privacy policy complies with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR).
privacy.s1content: Majster.AI is the controller of your personal data. We process data in compliance with GDPR (EU Regulation 2016/679).
privacy.s2content:
We collect:
• Account data: email, password (hashed), company name
• Company data: VAT no., address, phone, logo
• Client data entered by the User
• Project and quote data
• Technical data: IP, User Agent, cookies
• Analytics data
privacy.s3content:
We process data to:
• Provide services (legal basis: contract)
• Manage your account
• Generate and send quotes
• Analytics and service improvement
• Own product marketing (consent)
• Fulfil legal obligations
privacy.s4content:
We apply:
• SSL/TLS encryption for all connections
• Password hashing (bcrypt)
• Row Level Security (RLS) in the database
• Regular backups
• 24/7 security monitoring
• Restricted infrastructure access
privacy.s5content:
You have the right to:
• Access your data (Art. 15)
• Rectification (Art. 16)
• Erasure — right to be forgotten (Art. 17)
• Restriction of processing (Art. 18)
• Data portability (Art. 20)
• Object to processing (Art. 21)
• Withdraw consent at any time
privacy.s6content:
Data may be transferred to:
• Hosting providers (Supabase — EU/USA)
• Email providers (Resend)
• Government authorities (on legal request)

All data processors are bound by DPA agreements.
privacy.s7content:
For data protection enquiries:
• Email: kontakt.majsterai@gmail.com
• In-app: Settings → GDPR Centre

You have the right to lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority.

page.heading: Privacy Policy
page.section1Text: Majster.AI is the controller of your personal data. We make every effort to keep your data safe and process it in compliance with GDPR.
page.dataAccountDesc: first name, last name, email address, phone number
page.dataCompanyDesc: company name, VAT number, address, contact details
page.purpose2: Generating offers and quotes for your clients
page.rightsIntro: Under GDPR, you have the following rights:
page.rightAccessDesc: you can obtain information about your processed data
page.rightEraseDesc: you can request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten")
page.rightPortDesc: you can download your data in a machine-readable format
page.rightObjectDesc: you can object to the processing of your data
page.rightWithdrawDesc: you can withdraw your consent at any time
page.securityIntro: We apply the following security measures:
page.contactIntro: For matters related to personal data protection, you can contact us:
page.contactComplaint: You also have the right to file a complaint with the President of the Personal Data Protection Office (PUODO).

cookies.subtitle: How we use cookies in Majster.AI
cookies.metaDesc: Majster.AI Cookie Policy — how to manage cookies.
cookies.whatAreCookiesText: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you use our platform. They help remember your preferences and improve service performance.
cookies.necessaryText: Required for the service to function properly. Cannot be disabled. Used for authentication and security.
cookies.analyticsText: Help us understand how you use the service. They collect anonymous data. You can disable them in settings.
cookies.marketingText: Used for ad personalisation and campaign measurement. You can disable them without affecting service functionality.
cookies.howToManageText: You have several ways to manage cookies:
cookies.manageInApp: On our platform: Click the button below to change cookie settings.
cookies.manageInBrowser: In your browser: Block or delete cookies in browser settings.
cookies.incognito: Incognito mode: Cookies are not saved in private browsing mode.
cookies.footer: By continuing to use the service without changing browser settings, you consent to cookies as described in this policy.

dpa.subtitle: Data Processing Agreement (DPA) pursuant to Art. 28 GDPR
dpa.metaDesc: Majster.AI Data Processing Agreement compliant with GDPR Art. 28.
dpa.acceptanceText: By using Majster.AI, you accept this Data Processing Agreement. For questions: kontakt.majsterai@gmail.com
dpa.s1content:
This Data Processing Agreement (DPA) governs the processing of personal data by Majster.AI (Processor) on behalf of the User (Controller).

This Agreement forms an integral part of the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
dpa.s2content:
The Processor processes:
• Controller's client data
• Project and quote data
• Company documents

Purpose: provision of Majster.AI platform services.
Duration: for the service period + 30 days after termination.
dpa.s3content:
Technical and organisational measures:
• TLS 1.3 in-transit and AES-256 at-rest encryption
• Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
• Row Level Security (RLS) in the database
• Regular security audits
• Staff data protection training
• Incident response procedures
• Data backups with 30-day retention
dpa.s4content:
We use:
1. Supabase Inc. (USA) — database hosting and authentication, EU-US SCCs
2. Resend (USA) — transactional email, EU-US SCCs

The Controller will be notified of any new sub-processor with 14 days notice.
dpa.s5content:
Processor obligations:
• Process data only on documented Controller instructions
• Maintain staff confidentiality
• Assist Controller in fulfilling data subject rights
• Notify of data breaches within 72 hours
• Delete data upon agreement termination

Controller obligations:
• Establish legal basis for processing
• Inform data subjects
• Fulfil data subject rights
dpa.s6content:
The Controller may:
• Request information about processing
• Conduct audits (once per year, with 30 days notice)
• Inspect security documentation

Audit costs are borne by the initiating party, unless the audit reveals violations.

gdpr.subtitle: Manage your personal data
gdpr.metaDesc: Manage your personal data in compliance with GDPR.
gdpr.importantText: Under GDPR we have 30 days to fulfil your request. In complex cases the deadline may be extended by a further 60 days. Contact: kontakt.majsterai@gmail.com

access.title: Right of Access (Art. 15)
access.desc: You have the right to know what data we hold about you.
access.action: Review your data in your profile and settings.

rectify.title: Right to Rectification (Art. 16)
rectify.desc: You can correct your data if it is inaccurate.
rectify.action: Edit your data in the company profile.

portability.title: Right to Portability (Art. 20)
portability.desc: You can download all your data as a JSON file.
portability.action: Click the button to download a copy of your data.

erasure.title: Right to Erasure (Art. 17)
erasure.desc: You can request deletion of your account and all data.
erasure.action: This action is irreversible. We will process your request within 30 days.

deleteAccount.gdprNote: Under Art. 17 GDPR (Right to Be Forgotten), you have the right to delete all your personal data. Data is deleted immediately; encrypted backups are retained for up to 30 days for disaster recovery, then purged automatically. Financial records may be retained separately as required by law.

fixedPrice.title: Fixed-price construction contract
fixedPrice.desc: Lump-sum remuneration for works. The simplest form for a fixed price.

costPlus.title: Cost-plus contract (cost + margin)
costPlus.desc: Materials and labour costs plus contractor margin.

withMaterials.title: Contract with materials clause
withMaterials.desc: Defines who supplies materials: contractor, client or both.

withAdvance.title: Contract with advance & milestones
withAdvance.desc: Stage payments with an advance. Clear payment schedule for both parties.

simpleOrder.title: Simple order / mini-contract
simpleOrder.desc: Brief order confirmation for small renovation works.

finalAcceptance.title: Final acceptance protocol
finalAcceptance.desc: Formal acceptance of all works. Documents completion status and defects.

partialAcceptance.title: Partial / stage acceptance protocol
partialAcceptance.desc: Acceptance of a completed stage. Basis for stage payment.

siteHandover.title: Site handover / entry to site protocol
siteHandover.desc: Keys, meters, site handover. Transfers responsibility.

defectReport.title: Defect / fault report protocol
defectReport.desc: Documents a defect: description, urgency, immediate actions, repair deadline.

necessityChange.title: Necessity / scope change protocol
necessityChange.desc: Formal confirmation of scope change, impact on time and cost.

keyHandover.title: Key handover protocol
keyHandover.desc: Confirms handover of keys to the premises.

warrantyInspection.title: Warranty / service inspection protocol
warrantyInspection.desc: Inspection during warranty period, documents defects to remedy.

hiddenWorks.title: Hidden / covered works protocol
hiddenWorks.desc: Confirms hidden works before covering (reinforcement, sub-floor installations).

damage.title: Damage / flood protocol
damage.desc: Documents damage or flooding: scope, value, immediate actions.

contractChange.title: Contract annex (change of conditions)
contractChange.desc: Formally changes the deadline, cost or scope of the base contract.

costEstimate.title: Cost estimate / scope list (attachment)
costEstimate.desc: Detailed list of work items with prices. Attachment to contract.

milestoneSchedule.title: Milestone schedule & payments
milestoneSchedule.desc: Table of stages with dates and payment amounts. Attachment to contract.

materialsCard.title: Materials card / shopping list
materialsCard.desc: Materials needed for the works with quantities and suppliers.

hseChecklist.title: H&S and property protection checklist
hseChecklist.desc: Documents PPE and property protection measures for the client's premises.

clientStatement.title: Client statement on rights / consents
clientStatement.desc: Client confirms right to use the property and consents granted.

annualBuilding.title: Annual building inspection
annualBuilding.desc: Annual inspection of elements exposed to weather (Art. 62(1)(1) Building Law).

fiveYearBuilding.title: 5-year building inspection
fiveYearBuilding.desc: 5-year inspection of overall technical condition and fitness for use (Art. 62(1)(2) Building Law).

electricalLightning.title: 5-year electrical & lightning protection inspection
electricalLightning.desc: 5-year inspection of electrical installations and lightning protection with measurements.

gasChimney.title: Annual gas & chimney inspection
gasChimney.desc: Annual gas tightness check and chimney/flue clearance inspection.

largeBuilding.title: Large-area building inspection (twice yearly)
largeBuilding.desc: Buildings > 2000 m²: spring (before 31 May) and autumn (before 30 Nov) inspections (Art. 62(1)(1b) Building Law).

seoStructuredData.orgDescription: SaaS platform for construction professionals and contractors — PDF estimates, project management, AI.
seoStructuredData.appDescription: Tool for creating PDF estimates, managing projects and clients for construction and renovation companies.
seoStructuredData.faq1a: Yes, Majster.AI offers a free starter plan with no credit card required. You can start for free.
seoStructuredData.faq2a: Majster.AI is designed for construction companies, renovation firms, electricians, plumbers, and other professionals looking to professionalize their business.
seoStructuredData.faq3q: Can I generate a PDF offer?
seoStructuredData.faq3a: Yes, Majster.AI allows you to generate professional PDF offers with your company logo, cost items, and payment terms.
